entries.title: Shareable analysis views
entries.summary: Added canonical page URLs, stable dated links between History, Day Flow, and Battle Lines, and Copy current view controls for the separate Twitch and Kick data views.

entries.title: ViewLoom design refresh
entries.summary: Reworked the Portal and provider homes and rebuilt the core analysis pages around clearer controls, visible coverage states, and responsive layouts.

entries.title: Livefield becomes ViewLoom
entries.summary: Renamed the project to ViewLoom and established separate Twitch data and Kick data routes under one independent observation portal.

entries.title: Livefield begins
entries.summary: Started the live-stream observation project with Heatmap, Day Flow, and Battle Lines as distinct Now, Today, and Rivalry views.
